description: Community twin of android-app-agp: a single-module AGP app with a planted Kotlin defect (an empty catch in MainActivity.kt). The qodana.yaml bootstrap accepts SDK licenses and installs platforms;android-34 (the compile SDK). A Qodana scan is an IDE model import + inspections (not a build), so THIS fixture's scan needs no build-tools/aapt2. Validates qodana-android-community end to end: build + bootstrap + AGP import + Kotlin analysis producing SARIF, with plugins loaded cleanly. Network on. qodana-android-community reuses the qodana-jvm-community dist, so the empty catch surfaces as CatchMayIgnoreException (pinned in jvmc-basic). driverName/driverFullName are NEEDS-PINNING — pin both from the CI failure inventory dump alongside the rule id. The layout's AndroidLint defects are asserted once AndroidLint is confirmed to run here (QD-11439).

expectations.reason: STARTING-GUESS id: the planted empty `catch (e: Exception) {}` in MainActivity.kt must surface as CatchMayIgnoreException (confirmed for the shared qodana-jvm-community dist in jvmc-basic; here on Kotlin). If the Kotlin id differs, read the observed id (and the driver name/fullName) from the CI failure inventory dump and pin them confirmed.
